chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.69 of 2021 Asim Hameed Lodhi Versus Syed Nafees-ur-Rehman Zaini& another Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal (As advocate for applicant not supplied copy of appeal and cost not paid hence notice not issued) Dated: 06.12.2023 None present. -.-.- Appellant’s counsel is not regular and punctual in appearance since first date when it was fixed in Court on 29.11.2021 when he was called absent followed by an order of 14.02.2022 when he was again called absent. Later he failed to appear on 09.05.2022 and on the last date i.e. 01.03.2022. Even for the last two dates the matter is also coming up for non-prosecution as he has not made compliance. Today also position is same. The matter is fixed for non-prosecution and neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant First Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
